calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward Broitman for Petitioner.

The Court sets forth the petition and noted there are issues of fees that need to be reduced. Mr. Broitman stated that this estate was opened since 2003, that he and his partner took over this case in 2016 because every party died including the beneficiaries, that when he took over there was cash, and that he had to go over whether it was worth spending any more estate funds and time to chase down judgment creditors. The Court noted that is considered a loss in assets, that statutory fees are not based on time spent on whether it was worth it and will look at questions on how to make calculation adjustments.

The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Edward Broitman for Administrators via Court Call.

Mr. Broitman stated the petition has been filed and hearing date set for Jan. 15, 2020. The Status on Close of Estate is Off Calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
